Phone C is put on hold and plays the on hold tone

steps.action: Switch active call on phone A
steps.expected_result:

Worksheet.title: N_20_Call_Back_01_Call_Back_To_Free_Phone
Worksheet.description:
_0\. Prerequisites_

Call back feature must be allowed by the system



_1\. Objective_

The aim of this test is to check the call back feature on SIP devices
(on specified server) when distant is free



_2\. Configuration_

System config field give information about the context of the test :

\- System on which the test is done : OXE / OXO

\- Tested phone models (phone A, phone B and phone C)  : 
SIP : ALE300 / ALE400 / ALE500 
8028s / 8058s / 8068s/ 8078s / NOEIP / UA / Z / ...

3. automatic test

A_11_03_Automated_Telephony_Callback_PR418136_01_callee

steps.action:
Phone A calls phone B (phone models are specified in system_config field)

Phone B does not take the call
steps.expected_result: Phone B rings

steps.action:
On phone A press the ""Call back"" key

Note: not applicable on OXO.
steps.expected_result:
Phone B stops ringing

Phone B is notified that there is a call back request

steps.action: Phone B press the letter iconed physical key
steps.expected_result:
Phone B display the call back request and can select it to see who called
(here phone A)

steps.action:
Phone B calls back phone A

Phone A takes the call and end it
steps.expected_result: There is no call back request anymore on phone B

Worksheet.title: N_20_AUD_320_Audio-Mode_Commutation_Phases

None

_1\. Objective_

The aim of this test is to evaluate the subjective quality of the audio during
the commutation phases from an audio-mode to an other. (example: from handset
mode to hansfree mode)  
-no switching noise or echo or distortion should be heard. (on evaluation side and on distant side) 

_2\. Configuration_

2\. Initiate a communication between the set under evaluation in handset-mode
and a distant set (IP,UA, or Z)in handset mode .

1. Every time you switch from one audio mode to an other, pay attention to the
audio quality during the transition phase:  
  
\- no unpleasant switching noise should be heard.  
-no echo should be heard.  
-no distorsion of the distant's voice should be heard.  
  
On evaluation side and on distant side.

steps.action: Switch from handset-mode to handsfree-mode.

audio quality during the transition phase:  
  
\- no unpleasant switching noise should be heard.  
-no echo should be heard.  
-no distorsion of the distant's voice should be heard.  
  
On evaluation side and on distant side.

steps.action: Switch from handsfree-mode to handset-mode.
steps.expected_result:
1. Every time you switch from one audio mode to an other, pay attention to the
audio quality during the transition phase:  
  
\- no unpleasant switching noise should be heard.  
-no echo should be heard.  
-no distorsion of the distant's voice should be heard.  
  
On evaluation side and on distant side.

steps.action: Switch from hanset-mode to group-listening-mode.
steps.expected_result:

audio quality during the transition phase:  
  
\- no unpleasant switching noise should be heard.  
-no echo should be heard.  
-no distorsion of the distant's voice should be heard.  
  
On evaluation side and on distant side.

steps.action: Switch from group-listening-mode to handsfree-mode.
steps.expected_result:
1. Every time you switch from one audio mode to an other, pay attention to the
audio quality during the transition phase:  
  
\- no unpleasant switching noise should be heard.  
-no echo should be heard.  
-no distorsion of the distant's voice should be heard.  
  
On evaluation side and on distant side.

steps.action: Switch from handsfree-mode to handset-mode.
steps.expected_result:
1. Every time you switch from one audio mode to an other, pay attention to the
audio quality during the transition phase:  
  
\- no unpleasant switching noise should be heard.  
-no echo should be heard.  
-no distorsion of the distant's voice should be heard.
